transcripts.title: V06 — Openable Things
transcripts.description: Verify OpenableTrait on lunchbox and feed dispenser

commands.output:
Family Zoo
By Sharpee Tutorial

Type HELP for instructions.

Main Path

A wide gravel path winds through the heart of the zoo. Colorful direction signs point every which way. A park bench sits beside the path, and neat flower beds add splashes of color. To the east, a white picket fence surrounds the petting zoo. To the west, a tall mesh enclosure rises above the treetops — the aviary. The entrance gates are back to the north.

You can see direction signs, flower beds, souvenir penny, park bench, lunchbox here.
commands.comment: Go to Main Path where the lunchbox is

commands.output:
You open lunchbox.
Inside the lunchbox you see juice box.
In lunchbox you see: juice box.

Petting Zoo

A cheerful open-air enclosure filled with friendly animals. Pygmy goats trot around nibbling at visitors' shoelaces, while a pair of fluffy rabbits hop lazily near a hay bale. A feed dispenser is mounted on a post near the entrance. The main path is back to the west.

You can see pygmy goats, hay bale, rabbits, bag of animal feed, feed dispenser here.
commands.comment: Go to Petting Zoo for the feed dispenser

commands.output: You open feed dispenser, which is empty.
feed dispenser is fixed in place.
commands.comment: Try to take it — it's scenery
